---
description: "Give a directive or instruction to the company — change direction, set priorities, provide feedback"
agent: "liaison"
argument-hint: "Your directive or instruction for the company..."
---

The owner has a directive for the company. Process this directive:

1. Acknowledge what the owner is asking
2. Identify which agent(s) should handle this
3. Explain how and when it will take effect
4. Flag any concerns or conflicts with current plans

Owner's directive: ${input}
